title: Sponsor a refugee - Canada.ca
content:
Who is eligible to sponsor refugees, how the process works, and what you’re responsible for once you sponsor.

## Services and information

### How privately sponsoring a refugee works
Who can sponsor refugees and the differences between the sponsor types

### Sponsorship agreement holder
How organizations can get an agreement and how sponsoring works

### Groups of five refugee sponsorship Paused
Who can form a sponsoring group, forms, processing times and what to do after you apply

### Community sponsors Paused
How community organizations can work with us to sponsor refugees

### Joint Assistance Sponsorship (JAS) program
About sponsoring refugees with special needs

### Blended Visa Office-Referred (BVOR) program
How Canadians and permanent residents can play a key role in helping refugees be resettled
